texto: Life is always uncertain. No one knows what's in there. But now my life is everywhere, I would just like to breathe and sleep and get all the rest I could. I wake up five in the morning some days just thinking about my own thoughts and stare blankly in thin air. Not sure what I am looking at but I know for a fact I am in my own world. Those times I am just inside my head just thinking about what is ahead.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Happy Positivity Blankly Ahead: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Life is always uncertain.
